name: Ryan S George
headline: Preetiya Mysuru Maga
memory_place: CSE(AI), Maharaja Institute of Technology, Mysore
message: Dr Victor sir is actually one of the professors who pushes you to go beyond your horizions and do better. He is a person who is dependable and reliable, he always teaches us to think outside the box. If you attend his lectures, you get to see how active and enthusiastic he is about teaching and connecting related dots about the topic he is teaching with real-time examples. He is also jovial and kind for students who want to learn more and more. He is one of those professors that you look back and remember not only for his teaching, but also for the impact he leaves on his students. Sir is always easy to get along with and always shows his support for his students, hence he is popularly know as Preetiya Mysuru Maga. Its been an honour and privilege to have learnt so much from him, and I wish sir all the best for all of his future endeavours.

name: Ashwini Vishal Hebbali
headline: A Teacher I'll Never Forget
message: I’ll always be your student—forever and ever and ever. Thank you so much for everything. You called my name in every single class, and I never once minded because I always knew you only wanted the absolute best for me❤️😁. I have never seen you as just a professor; to me, you are truly like family. Thank you from the bottom of my heart for your guidance, support, and constant belief in me. Thank you for everything, Sir. ❤️

media.alt: Ashwini Vishal Hebbali with Dr. Victor Agughasi

name: Mohammed Furqan
headline: I will take it personal.... b looking at me.... i want only problems no peace 😂
message: Thank you so much, Sir! ❤️ I’m truly grateful that I had the opportunity to be under your guidance throughout my engineering journey. Thank you for always supporting us, motivating us, and helping us in countless ways, both inside and outside the classroom. Beyond academics, I’ll always cherish the fun moments, the laughs, the advice, and the memories we created along the way. You made our engineering life much more enjoyable and memorable. Thank you for your patience, encouragement, and for believing in us even when we doubted ourselves. We’ll carry your lessons and your memories with us wherever life takes us. Wishing you happiness, success, and good health always. Thank you for everything, Sir. We'll definitely miss you! 😊🙏

name: Geethanjali M
headline: A Memorable Learning Journey!!😍
message: Thank you, Victor Sir, for your guidance, support, and inspiration throughout our learning journey. We learned so much from you and will always cherish these memories. We will miss you forever, Sir. 😊

name: Mohammed Nabeel N H
headline: I want problems & Be looking at my face 😂😭
message: Victor Sir, thank you for being such an amazing person and a constant source of positivity. Your energy, kindness, and the way you connected with everyone made a lasting impact on us. Wishing you success and happiness in your next journey—you will truly be missed! ❤️

name: Punyashree
headline: Memories with Mysore maga
memory_place: Capture memory with vedios and photos
